requirements.title: Compute tip, total, and per-person amounts

criteria.given: a valid bill total, tip percentage, and people count
criteria.then: the tip, total, and per-person amounts are returned rounded to 2 decimals using round-half-up

criteria.given: a bill total and a tip percentage
criteria.then: the tip equals bill x pct / 100 and the total equals bill + tip

criteria.given: a total with tip and a number of people
criteria.then: the per-person amount equals the total divided by the number of people
the tip amount is 0.00 and the total equals the bill total

criteria.given: a number of people below 1 or not an integer
criteria.then: the input is rejected with an error and no amounts are returned

criteria.given: a negative bill total or a negative tip percentage
criteria.then: the input is rejected with an out-of-range error

edge_cases: Tip percentage of exactly 0 yields a zero tip and unchanged total.
Number of people of 0 or a fractional value is rejected.
Negative bill total is rejected as out of range.
Negative tip percentage is rejected as out of range.
Rounding at the half-cent uses round-half-up.
